title: Enchantments
body:
Adds 14 enchantments to the game.

Enchantments:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Step Height: +0.5, then +1 block step height per level. (Lv2)(Boots)
  
Knockback Resistance: +5% Knockback Resistance per level. (Lv3)(All Armor)

Guiding Wind: +50%, then +25% flying speed per level. (Lv3)(Harness)

Health: +0.5 hearts per level. (Lv5)(All Armor)

Armor Cladding: +0.5 armor per level. (Lv5)(All Armor)

Armor Hardening: +0.5 armor Toughness per level. (Lv4)(All Armor)

Strength: +1 attack damage per level. (Lv4)(Chestplates)

Swiftstep: +10% movement speed per level. (Lv5)(Boots)(Soulspeed Exclusive)

Swiftstrike: +20%, then 15% attack speed per level. (Lv3)(All Tools & Weapons)

Polearm: +0.5 entity reach per level. (Lv2)(All Tools & Weapons)

Reach: +0.5 block reach per level. (Lv3)(All Tools & Weapons)

Poison Aspect: Applies poison 1 for 2.25 seconds. +1 effect level, +2.25s per level. (Lv2)(Swords)

Withering Aspect: Applies wither 1 for 2 seconds. +1 effect level, +2s per level. (Lv2)(Swords)

Focused Efficiency: +25% mining efficiency per level. (Lv5)(Picks, Axes, Shovels, Hoes, Shears)

</details>
